name: AG Pavilion-at the Kefauver Football fields
description: Come play pickleball at AG Pavilion-at the Kefauver Football fields in Madisonville, TN! There are 3 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Rarity Bay Golf & Country Club
description: Rarity Bay Golf & Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Vonore, TN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water.
